message:
fix(tui): wire ArchiveBrowser screen into perf baselines and soak replay tests

Update test infrastructure to include the new 16th screen variant:
- tui_screens/mod.rs: bump from_number_invalid boundary from 15 to 16
- tui_perf_baselines.rs: add ArchiveBrowserScreen import and
  MailScreenId::ArchiveBrowser arms in screen_name() and new_screen()
- tui_soak_replay.rs: add MailScreenId::ArchiveBrowser arm in
  screen_name()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
